title: Observer Flying Machine
description: A self-propelled slime/honey block engine that flies in a straight line. Core idea: two observers face each other across a slime block; each observer's pulse pushes a sticky piston that drags the whole machine one block forward, then the other observer fires and repeats — endless motion. Minimal build: a slime block with an observer on each end (facing into the slime), a sticky piston behind each observer pointed in the travel direction, and one extra honey or slime block tying the pistons to the structure so the engine stays together. Slime sticks to most blocks; honey does NOT stick to slime, which is how builders make the machine drop cargo. Start it by placing a single redstone block on the engine to trigger the first observer, then mine the redstone block. Direction of travel is set by which way the pistons face.

steps.title: Slime block core and observers
steps.explanation: Place a slime block at (1,0,0) — this is the engine core that the pistons drag along. Place an observer at (0,0,0) facing east (its face watches the slime, back outputs west). Place an observer at (2,0,0) facing west (face watches slime, back outputs east). Both observers react when the machine moves, creating a self-sustaining pulse chain.

steps.title: Sticky pistons
steps.explanation: Place sticky piston at (−1,0,0) facing east — its output face toward the engine, pushed by the west observer. Place sticky piston at (3,0,0) facing west — its output face toward the engine, pushed by the east observer. When the west piston extends it pushes the whole engine east; this triggers the east observer, which fires the east piston pulling it west, creating perpetual motion.

steps.title: Second slime layer for structural integrity
steps.explanation: Add a second slime block at (1,1,0) above the core — this is where you attach cargo. Add slime blocks at (0,1,0) and (2,1,0) to bind the top row to the observers below. This makes the engine a rigid 4×2×1 slab that holds together while flying. To start the machine, temporarily place a redstone block at (−1,1,0) adjacent to the west piston to trigger the first observer pulse, then quickly break it — the engine will fly east. Flip the slime blocks to honey blocks on one side to make a one-way machine that drops cargo by breaking the sticky connection.
